description: You are an instructional coordinator preparing materials for a teacher training workshop that will take place at a rural school with unreliable internet access. Save the following Wikipedia articles as PDF files to ~/Documents/Workshop_Materials/ with the specified filenames: 'blooms_taxonomy.pdf' (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bloom%27s_taxonomy), 'constructivism.pdf' (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Constructivism_(philosophy_of_education)), and 'differentiated_instruction.pdf' (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Differentiated_instruction). Ensure the PDFs contain the full article content. Create an index file at ~/Documents/Workshop_Materials/README.txt listing each PDF filename and a brief description of the topic (Bloom's Taxonomy, Constructivism, and Differentiated Instruction).

metadata.occupation_context: Instructional Coordinator - preparing offline training materials
